---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit changes to MagicBits
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] i18n / translation
- [ ] Chore (maintenance, build scripts, CI, etc.)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] `npm run build` — validation passes
- [ ] Tested in Figma Desktop (version: _____)
- [ ] Tested with different layer types (Component, Frame, Group, Shape, Text)

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (ES5-compatible, 2-space indent)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md if needed
- [ ] I have updated the i18n messages in both `code.js` and `ui.html` (if applicable)
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md document

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes.
